title: Lafayette Park Tickets [2026] - Promos, Prices, Reviews & Opening Hours | Trip.com
content: # Lafayette Park. ## Lafayette Park attraction highlights. One popular spot to visit that the whole family can enjoy is the Lafayette Park which is located in the Pacific Heights neighborhood of San Francisco, California. The location of this park is on a hill and the views can appear in every direction you can think of and as a result you can see many city neighborhoods as well as the San Francisco Bay and Alcatraz. It was developed in 1936 and the renovation of nearly all of the park's infrastructure and landscaping starts in May of 2012 and it continues until May of 2013. ## Lafayette Park Reviews: Insider Insights and Visitor Experiences. ### Best Experiences in San Francisco.
